data.title: Hubtown Limited Boosts Stake in Subsidiary RTPL
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Hubtown Limited ( (IN:HUBTOWN) ) is now available.

Hubtown Limited has increased its stake in its subsidiary, Rare Townships Private Limited (RTPL), from 67.53% to 72.91% by subscribing to a rights issue. This move strengthens Hubtown’s position in the real estate market and enhances its control over RTPL, which is also engaged in the development of residential and commercial properties.

More about Hubtown Limited

Hubtown Limited operates in the real estate industry, focusing on the construction and development of residential and commercial premises.

data.description:

An update from Carpenter Technology ( (CRS) ) is now available.

On February 18, 2025, Carpenter Technology hosted an Investor Update Event to discuss the company’s strategy and growth opportunities. The company has increased its aerospace and defense revenue share to 60% and expanded its market capitalization significantly. The firm is on track to generate substantial cash flow and has initiated a $400 million share repurchase program and a $40 million annual dividend, reflecting a strong shareholder return.

More about Carpenter Technology

Carpenter Technology Corporation operates in the specialty materials industry, focusing on manufacturing highly specialized products for critical applications. Their market focus includes aerospace, defense, medical, energy, transportation, industrial, and consumer sectors.

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Banyan Tree Holdings ( (SG:B58) ) has issued an announcement.

Banyan Tree Holdings has announced the schedule for its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM). Key agenda items include the re-election of retiring board members and the approval of a cash dividend payment. The meeting is set to be held online on April 21, 2025, following the board’s resolution on February 18, 2025. This AGM is significant for the company as it will discuss the certification of the minutes from the 2024 AGM and other crucial agenda items, underscoring the company’s ongoing governance and commitment to shareholder engagement.

data.title: PetVivo Holdings Partners with VetStem for Innovative Veterinary Solutions
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

PetVivo Holdings ( (PETV) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 14, 2025, PetVivo Holdings, Inc. entered into an Exclusive License and Supply Agreement with VetStem, Inc. to commercialize VetStem’s PrecisePRP® equine and canine products. This agreement allows PetVivo to sell and import these allogeneic orthobiologic products, which are innovative off-the-shelf platelet-rich plasma solutions for veterinary use. The agreement includes a series of milestone and royalty payments, along with an option for PetVivo to purchase certain assets from VetStem. This partnership is expected to enhance PetVivo’s market positioning in the veterinary medical devices and regenerative medicine sector by leveraging VetStem’s expertise in regenerative solutions.

More about PetVivo Holdings

PetVivo Holdings, Inc. is a biomedical device company specializing in the manufacturing, commercialization, and licensing of innovative medical devices and therapeutics for companion animals. The company focuses on adapting human therapies for veterinary use, with its flagship product being Spryng™ with OsteoCushion™ Technology, an injectable for managing joint-related issues in cats, dogs, and horses.

Average Trading Volume: 30,306

data.title: Enertopia Secures Patent for Water-Producing System
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Enertopia ( (ENRTD) ) is now available.

On February 18, 2025, Enertopia announced the issuance of a patent for its ‘ENERTOPIA RAINMAKER’ water-producing system by the United States Patent Trademark Office. This system captures atmospheric moisture to produce water, potentially offering a sustainable solution for arid regions where desalination is costly and energy-intensive. The system can be integrated with solar arrays to enhance the return on investment by producing water at night or during favorable conditions. This innovation could provide a cost-effective alternative to traditional desalination plants, which require significant capital and energy, thus addressing water scarcity in various parts of the world.

More about Enertopia

Enertopia Corporation is an energy solutions company focused on building shareholder value through intellectual property patents in green technologies, particularly in the energy sector, and also holds lithium claims in Nevada. Its shares are quoted in the United States and Canada under the ticker symbol ENRT.

YTD Price Performance: -43.43%

data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Jumbo Group Ltd. (Singapore) ( (SG:42R) ) is now available.

Jumbo Group Ltd., a Singaporean company, held its tenth Annual General Meeting (AGM), chaired by Mr. Tan Cher Liang, on January 24, 2025. The meeting was conducted in accordance with the Catalist Rules, and all resolutions were decided by a poll. Boardroom Corporate & Advisory Services Pte Ltd and Reliance 3P Advisory Pte Ltd were appointed as the polling agent and scrutineer, respectively. A video was shown to shareholders explaining the voting process, and the Group CEO, Mr. Ang Kiam Meng, addressed the shareholders.
